case_title: MARGARET SCHOPP VS. SEQUOIA PACIFIC CONSTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,094.00 FILED BY SCHOPP, MARGARET AS TO DEFENDANT SEQUOIA PACIFIC CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY SCHOPP, MARGARET SEQUOIA PACIFIC CONSTRUCTION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHOPP, MARGARET IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SEQUOIA PACIFIC CONSTRUCTION NO EVIDENCE BY THE PLAINTIFF THAT THE DEFENDANT DID NOT PERFORM THE CONTRACTED WORK IN A NON-NEGLIGENT MANNER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED JAN-25-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SEQUOIA PACIFIC CONSTRUCTION
